scripts.dev: bun run --filter @freemac/core dev & bun run --filter @freemac/web dev & wait
scripts.build: bun run --filter @freemac/shared build && bun run --filter @freemac/core build && bun run --filter @freemac/web build
scripts.check: bun run --filter @freemac/shared check && bun run --filter @freemac/core check && bun run --filter @freemac/web check
